headline: Trump 🍊📞 INFANTINO 🐍⚽ BENDS RULES 🛠️ for BALOGUN 🔴➡️🟢
text: FIFA ⚽🏆 RED CARD SYSTEM 💳🔴 in TOTAL DISARRAY 🤯😵 after Trump 🍊👑 and Gianni Infantino 🤝🐍 teamed up for Balogun 🏃‍♂️🇺🇸 FREE PASS! Folarin 🔥💥 Balogun sent off 🚫🟥 vs Bosnia 🇧🇦 in last-32 but now CLEARED ✅ to face Belgium 🇧🇪 Monday! US TOP SCORER 🥇 with THREE GOALS ⚽⚽⚽ gets ONE MATCH SIN BIN 😤 not TWO! 189 REDS in WC HISTORY 📜 but only TWO PLAYERS ever SKATED FREE 🛼❄️ - Garrincha 🇧🇷 1962 had NO AUTO BAN and now Balogun joins the ELITE CLUB 🏛️💎! Trump 🍊 called Infantino direct 📲🗣️ on Thursday and POOF 💨 the ban SUSPENDED under ARTICLE 27 🧾🪄 - a RULE never used at WC before! Ronaldo 🇵🇹 got LENIENCY too but that was QUALI not WC 🔥! Belgium 🇧🇪 FURIOUS 😡🤬 calling it APRIL FOOLS in JULY 🗓️🤡 and Micah Richards 🗣️ says it's a FARCE 🤡 that MOCKS the TOURNAMENT! 'SPORTSMANSHIP IN QUESTION' 🤔 after Trump White House 🏛️ pressure with Rubio 🗣️ and Giuliani 👔 all CHIMING IN! Fifa claims NO APPEALS 🚫 but Balogun gets SPECIAL DISPENSATION 🎟️ while Madibo 🇶🇦 got FIVE GAME BAN for ACCIDENT 😳! VAR REVIEW 📺👀 overturned the 'HARSH' ankle STOMP but INTENT doesn't matter per LAWS ⚖️! Pochettino 😎 pleased but Rooney 🏴󠁧󠁢󠁥󠁮󠁧󠁿 calls it ABSOLUTE DISGRACE 🤬! Precedent set now EVERY COACH will BEG for CLEMENCY 🙏 - will next RED mean NOTHING? 😱 Eyes on Balogun vs Belgium MONDAY - World Cup 2026 PATH looks WILD 🛤️🔥!
